data.title: Integrity Jets sees 33% increase in business, becomes major player in light and midsize jet brokerage in just two years.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on January 12, 2026, Integrity Jets, a prominent player in the light and midsize business jet brokerage sector, has demonstrated impressive growth with a 33% increase in business year-over-year. Founded by Eric Hammer in early 2024, Integrity Jets has swiftly emerged as a significant entity in the industry.

data.title: Four unions at Solano County will strike from January 13, including SEIU Local 1021, IFPTE Local 21, IUOE Local 39, and UAPD.
data.description: In Fairfield, California, on January 12, 2026, a significant development was announced regarding public County employees. Starting tomorrow, January 13th, the majority of these employees, who are members of Solano County labor unions such as SEIU Local 1021, IFPTE Local 21, IUOE Local 39, and UAPD, will embark on a strike. They are protesting against what they perceive as unfair labor practices within the County. This action will impact a substantial number of employees and service provision in the County.

data.title: Debut of Think Pink Gala on March 14, 2026, at Plaza Hotel with Bernadette Peters & gourmet dining experience.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, a prestigious event celebrating glamour and artistry in aid of breast cancer patients, survivors, and families was announced to take place in New York. The Think Pink Gala is set to premiere on March 14, 2026, at the renowned Plaza Hotel. The event aims to bring together supporters for a night of generosity and cultural significance. The Gala is anticipated to draw attention and support for the cause, with a wide audience expected to attend this inaugural event.

data.title: PVP Labs to showcase TAPHALGIN® analgesic at JP Morgan Healthcare Conference 2026 for investors. Innovating non-addictive analgesic platform.
data.description: A biotechnology company based in San Francisco, PVP Labs, has revealed their involvement in the JP Morgan Healthcare Conference 2026. They will be showcasing their primary product, TAPHALGIN®, an inventive analgesic platform. TAPHALGIN® is a pioneering tetrapeptide analgesic specially designed to provide prompt and significant pain relief without causing addiction. This presentation at the conference aims to attract interest from institutional investors and strategic partners.

data.title: Sectigo and Bluechip Infotech partner to distribute solutions for shorter SSL/TLS certificate lifespans in Australia. #Cybersecurity #CLM.
data.description: Sectigo, a prominent company specializing in automated Certificate Lifecycle Management (CLM) and digital certificates, has recently partnered with major Australian IT distributor Bluechip Infotech. This collaboration allows Bluechip Infotech to distribute Sectigo’s CLM and cybersecurity solutions through its reseller and MSP network in Australia. The partnership aims to assist Australian businesses in adjusting to reduced certificate lifespans and preparing for advancements in quantum technology. This initiative signifies an important step in enhancing cybersecurity measures for businesses in the region.

data.title: New dietary guidelines prioritize whole foods, aim to lower medical costs. Shift towards minimally processed foods for health.
data.description: In Costa Mesa, California, on January 12, 2026, the recently revealed U.S. dietary recommendations and revised food pyramid mark a change in national nutrition strategy, highlighting the importance of whole, minimally processed foods for overall well-being. These guidelines prioritize organizations providing food as part of medical care, advocating for healthier eating habits to improve long-term health outcomes.

data.title: Century-old Dow Theory signals buy, 2026 market trend positive as industrial and transportation stocks rally together.
data.description: A rare buy signal recently flashed by a century-old market theory, Dow Theory, indicates that the ongoing three-year-old bull market may not be over yet as 2026 begins. Adam Turnquist, chief technical strategist at LPL Financial, pointed out the bullish signal, indicating that the primary trend for the broader market is still upward. Dow Theory, dating back to the early 1900s and developed by Charles Dow, uses the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the Dow Jones Transportation Average to determine market trends based on the movement of industrial and transportation stocks together. The theory suggests that if both sectors rally together, it reflects improving economic conditions and a healthy market trend. This recent buy signal highlights the potential for continued market growth in the near future.

data.title: Forecast predicts Military Trucks Market growth by 2033 due to procurement and global integration, says ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A recent report titled "Military Trucks - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. These trucks serve as essential assets for armed forces, offering mobility and logistical support across various levels of operations. They play a vital role in transporting troops, equipment, and serving as platforms for weapon systems like artillery and missiles. The report provides insights into the military truck market, with a focus on technologies and forecasts up to 2033. It discusses the wide array of functionalities these trucks provide, making them indispensable in modern warfare strategies.

data.description: Everfox, a reputable cybersecurity company based in Herndon, Virginia, revealed the hiring of Dave Wajsgras as the new Chairman and Chief Executive Officer.

data.title: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ: STLD) will release Q4 and full year 2025 financial results before market opens in January 2026.
data.description: Fort Wayne, Indiana - On January 12, 2026, Steel Dynamics, Inc. (STLD), a leading domestic steel producer and metals recycler in North America, revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year of 2025 before the market opens. STLD is listed on the NASDAQ/GS and is known for being one of the largest players in the steel industry. Stay tuned for detailed insights on the company's performance in the past year.

data.title: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges VTYX, FONR, SNCY, FFIC shareholders to discuss their rights regarding potential violations. Contact for more information.
data.description: Investors are advised to reach out to the firm promptly as there is a time constraint to assert their rights. On January 12, 2026, in New York, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm specializing in investor rights, is looking into various companies for potential infringements of federal securities laws and/or breaches. It is important for shareholders to take action quickly in such situations.

data.title: General Dynamics to webcast Q4 and full-year financial results conference call on Jan. 28th, 2025 at 9am EST. More info at www.gd.com.
data.description: General Dynamics, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GD, has announced that it will be hosting a live webcast of its Q4 and full-year financial results conference call on January 28, 2026, at 9 a.m. EST. The webcast can be accessed at www.gd.com. For those unable to tune in live, a replay of the conference call will be available afterwards.

data.title: Research report on Latin America Digital Commerce & Payments in the Age of AI for 2026. Covers 7 countries.
data.description: A recent report titled "Latin America Digital Commerce & Payments in the Age of AI, 2026" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the impact of digital commerce, changing payment systems, and artificial intelligence on the retail and financial sectors in Latin America. It offers a comprehensive analysis of market growth, transactional infrastructure, consumer trends, and corporate adaptations in key countries such as Brazil, Mexico, Argentina, and Colombia. This report provides valuable insights into the future of commerce and payments in the region.

data.title: FORTÉ promotes Zach Valigura, Kendra Apelt, and Chris Clark to bolster business ops in Minneapolis.
data.description: Forté, based in Minneapolis, recently announced the promotion of three key leaders to enhance its business operations. Zach Valigura, Kendra Apelt, and Chris Clark have been promoted to take on more responsibilities within the company. This move is aimed at further solidifying Forté's position in the market and driving growth.
